entity.label: Geliloth
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Circles; regions, a place in the border of Benjamin (Josh. 18:17); called Gilgal in 15:7.

nodes.label: Geliloth
nodes.description: Circles; regions, a place in the border of Benjamin (Josh. 18:17); called Gilgal in 15:7.

verses.text: And was drawn from the north, and went forth to Enshemesh, and went forth toward Geliloth, which is over against the going up of Adummim, and descended to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben,
